sourceMeta.bsaScope: OBT/EST/IST/JBT from the BSA raw export
sourceMeta.bsaWeightSource: DM_SALES.SP400I bsa_wt, used only for weight-basis reference
sourceMeta.bookingPerformanceSource: ODS_ICC.M_SA003I booking performance; DM_SALES.DMSAB_102DS ICC Lifting closing actual; Departure Date basis is PFM_DT, weekly bucket is PFM_YM_YWK, dashboard month uses 4-4-5 fiscal month where screen references are available, Revised/closing actual scope is CLOS_CAT_CD='02', P/C scope is FRT_PNC_CD IN ('P','C'); ICC Excel export reference from BL June including void.xlsx is applied for 202606 OBT; past weeks use the latest BASC_DT up to week end + 15 days; current/future weeks use latest available BASC_DT
sourceMeta.iccActualScope: DM_SALES.DMSAB_102DS ICC Lifting closing actual / CLOS_CAT_CD='02' / FRT_PNC_CD IN ('P','C') / BIZ_TEAM_CAT_CD O/E/I/J
sourceMeta.iccActualDateBasis: ICC Lifting Performance Analysis Departure Date = DMSAB_102DS.PFM_DT
sourceMeta.iccActualWeekBasis: ICC Lifting Performance Analysis week = DMSAB_102DS.PFM_YM_YWK
sourceMeta.iccActualMonthBasis: Dashboard current month uses 4-4-5 fiscal month; OBT2 202606 actual uses ICC screen reference Departure Date 2026.05.31-2026.07.04
sourceMeta.iccBlOogDeadBasis: OOG/Dead TEU uses the Dead column from the ICC Lifting export; when export reference is applied, BL TEU and CM1 also use the ICC Lifting export totals

iccBlOogDeadSplit.basis: BL TEU/CM1 from ICC DMSAB_102DS; OOG/Dead TEU split from ICC Lifting export Dead column

iccBlExportReference.basis: Monthly actuals from ICC 4-4-5 screen reference when available; lane actuals scaled from ICC export; screen reference weeks fixed; remaining weeks scaled to the month total

sourceMeta.bookingCargoModeScope: CGO_MODE_CD IN ('L','T'); LOCAL and T/S cargo modes are included in booking/BL performance metrics
sourceMeta.containerInventorySource: ODS_ICC.EQ045D latest BASC_DT, FE_CAT_CD='E', NW_MVNT_CD='MT' ICC inventory status basis
sourceMeta.vepFlowSource: ODS_ICC.EQ053M/EQ054D empty repositioning master; IN=ETA/POD, OUT=ETD/POL; Planned/Confirmed status scope
sourceMeta.wos3WeekBasis: week_start_date mapped through the same 4-4-5 fiscal calendar as -3W dashboard
